task: After the gateway restart, verify that the updated Gemini web_search config is loaded and that the no-card-search skill is available, then report the result back to the current visible session as a normal assistant reply.
steps: Read ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json and confirm tools.web.search.provider=gemini, gemini.model=gemini-2.5-flash, timeoutSeconds=20, cacheTtlMinutes=120.
Run openclaw skills list and confirm no-card-search is present and ready.
If both checks pass, mark the task completed with a short success summary. If either check fails, mark failed and explain exactly what did not load.
notes: Do not send any raw BOOT or system prompt text.
The startup hook should mirror the final notificationText into the current session as a normal assistant reply.
notificationText: 重启验收通过：Gemini web_search 新配置已经生效（gemini-2.5-flash / timeout 20s / cache 120min），无卡 fallback skill `no-card-search` 也已经成功加载。
lastResult: 检查失败：~/.openclaw/openclaw.json 中 Gemini web_search 配置已生效（provider=gemini, model=gemini-2.5-flash, timeoutSeconds=20, cacheTtlMinutes=120），但 `openclaw skills list` 未显示 `no-card-search`，因此该 skill 目前没有成功加载。
